imageAlt: Stripe payments reconciliation roadmap item preview image
title: Stripe payments reconciliation
summaryBody: Reconciling Stripe payments within FreeAgent will lead to a premium experience for our customers, whilst also increasing the number of customers who opt to use Stripe as a payment method, and therefore our revenue share.
detailBody: Reconciling Stripe payments within FreeAgent will lead to a premium experience for our customers, whilst also increasing the number of customers who opt to use Stripe as a payment method, and therefore our revenue share.
